inapplicable.help: <object> elements must have alternative text

inapplicable.help: Summary elements must have discernible text

violations.help: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space

any.message: Target has insufficient size (44.9px by 21px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 21px instead of at least 24px.
